products.name: PrimeCor Tracker
products.descriptor: GNSS and LTE Remote ID module for UAS regulatory compliance

evidence.snippet: This innovative device not only provides precise GNSS location broadcasting for your UAS but also transmits UAS location data via the mobile network to UTM/U-space services, thereby enabling visualization of drone geolocation and fulfillment of Remote ID regulatory requirements.

**When you purchase PrimeCor Tracker, you will receive:**
*   1 x PrimeCor tracker

PrimeCor Tracker complies with EN 4709-002, enabling operators to meet the requirements of direct remote identification as outlined in Implementing Regulation (EU) 2019/947 **[(Declaration of Compliance)](https://primecorsys.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/EU-declaration-of-conformity-sent-v.1.pdf).** All drones operating in specific category and drones with class marks operating in the open category will be required to have direct remote identification.

products.name: PrimeCor Zero
products.descriptor: C5/C6 UAS conversion kit for EASA STS safety compliance

evidence.snippet:
PRIMECOR ZERO
-------------
#### C5-C6 UAS conversion kit
U-space safety management system designed to ensure approved execution of safety-critical unmanned urban operations and in-line with the highest reliability requirements from civil authorities.

[**PrimeCor Zero**](https://primecorsys.com/en/service-zero/) is a unique solution that enables drone manufacturers to **adapt existing platforms** to meet C5 or C6 requirements **without altering the drone’s core architecture**.
**Key benefits for manufacturers:**

products.name: PrimeCor Enhanced Containment
products.descriptor: Geocaging system to enforce UAS operational volume boundaries

evidence.snippet: Gracias a su tecnología geocaging **[PrimeCor cuidará que el UAV pueda moverse de forma controlada sin salirse de su volumen operacional](https://primecorsys.com/solucion-enhanced-containment/)** aprobado y así, evitar coaliciones con otras aeronaves que incluso pueden ser tripuladas o entrar en zonas de mayor riesgo en tierra.

products.name: Autopilot – Flight Control System (FCS)
products.descriptor: Custom UAS autopilot designed per client platform and mission

evidence.snippet: El sistema de control de vuelo (Flight Control Systems, FCS), comúnmente llamado autopiloto, es el «core» de cualquier aeronave no tripulada. Por ello, **PrimeCor propone un diseño personalizado para cada tipo de dron, UAS o UAV**, garantizando así la máxima fiabilidad y rendimiento en cada misión.
Agenda tu reunión escribiendo a  sales@primecorsys.com

products.name: PrimeCor One
products.descriptor: UAS safety system for SAIL III and IV high-risk operations

evidence.snippet: **PrimeCor One**, desarrollado para operaciones con niveles de riesgo **SAIL III y SAIL IV**, con funcionalidades de seguridad y redundancia.

products.name: PrimeCor Cloud
products.descriptor: Cloud Safety-as-a-Service for UAS fleet management and UTM/U-space integration

evidence.snippet:
PrimeCor Cloud
Safety-as-a-Service
------------------------------------
PrimeCor Cloud proporciona servicios basados en la nube a pilotos remotos, operadores o coordinadores de flotas para supervisar, controlar y gestionar sus operaciones, vehículos y actividades de mantenimiento de forma integrada.

unresolved_questions: PrimeCor One: only a brief mention on the FCS page (resource-0011 line 39); no dedicated product page was fetched or found indexed. Readiness is unknown.
PrimeCor Enhanced Containment: dedicated page (solucion-enhanced-containment) was skipped due to class budget exhaustion; readiness and full feature set unknown.
All products: ndaa and blue_uas are unknown — PrimeCor is a Spanish company whose compliance language is entirely EASA/EU-focused with no US NDAA or DIU Blue UAS mentions anywhere in corpus.

Spanish-language product pages (solucion-primecor-tracker, solucion-primecor-zero) were fetched as resource-0001/0010/0011; English equivalents (en/service-tracker, en/service-zero, en/service-cloud, en/en-uav-autopilots) were all skipped_class_budget and may contain additional specification detail.
